name: CG Vyapam – Fireman, Driver and More – 295 Posts

basic_details.job_title: CG Vyapam Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 295 Fireman, Driver and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: CG Vyapam Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 295 Fireman, Driver and More vacancies across Chhattisgarh. Candidates with 12TH, B.Sc / B.E, ITI Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 08-05-2026, and closes on 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CG Vyapam website, vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Chhattisgarh Professional Examination Board (CG Vyapam) on behalf of Fire & Emergency Services and SDRF

selection_process: Physical Efficiency Test (already conducted) + Written Examination + Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates must register/create profile on CG Vyapam website, then fill and submit the online application form. Upload scanned photo and signature as per specifications. Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.
